name: Dr. Maria Silva
bio: Brazilian-born GP with 15 years experience. Specialising in family medicine and women's health. Bulk billing available.

name: Nguyen Thanh & Associates
bio: Registered migration agent (MARN 1234567). Specialising in family and skilled worker visas. Over 20 years helping the Vietnamese community in Sydney.

name: Kim Accounting Services
bio: Korean-speaking CPA offering tax returns, BAS, and business advisory. Specialising in small business and sole traders.

name: Little Mumbai Early Learning
bio: Family-run childcare centre celebrating Indian culture. Hindi and Tamil speaking educators. Vegetarian meals available. Ages 0-5.

name: Chen & Wang Lawyers
bio: Bilingual law firm specialising in property, commercial, and family law. Serving the Chinese community in St George area since 2008.

name: Siam Thai Kitchen
bio: Authentic Thai cuisine by Chef Somchai. Street food favourites and regional specialties. BYO. Open for lunch and dinner.

name: Dr. Ahmed Hassan
bio: Lebanese-Australian GP with a focus on men's health and chronic disease management. Arabic-speaking consultations available. Bulk billing.

name: Santos Migration Services
bio: Brazilian registered migration agent. Specialising in student visas, partner visas, and skilled migration. Free initial consultation.
